title: Self Maintenance | #shorts
full_text: zna you're back here again this is like the third day I told you we need it every 3 days my hair it grows so fast I have so much hair on my face why don't you just get laser hair removal laser is a longterm thing I'm not ready to make that kind of commitment and I like how this feels you feel so clean when you're done you like how pain feels that's right if I don't feel pain every 3 days how will I know I'm alive
